visual_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man with dark hair, wearing a light blue collared shirt and a lanyard with an ID badge. He is in a dimly lit, indistinct indoor space. The camera is slightly shaky, suggesting a handheld perspective. In the top left corner, the Chinese characters "风行网" are visible in white. The audio begins with the distinct, high-pitched, and slightly distorted sound of a classic mobile phone ringing. The camera cuts to a tighter shot of the man's hands as he reaches into his shirt pocket. He pulls out a silver flip phone and opens it. The background remains dark and out of focus. The "风行网" text is still present in the corner. The shot returns to a close-up of the man's face. He brings the open phone to his ear, his expression serious and focused. He wears a watch on his left wrist. The background is dark and blurry, with a hint of a reflective surface to the right of the frame. The "风行网" text remains on screen.
